criteria.description: Every page is classified from conf diff evidence without inventing content or treating byte-only change as semantic.
The response preserves incomplete and baseline_mismatch semantics instead of treating an exit-8 result as missing evidence or success.
Semantic, byte-only, unchanged, blocked, completeness, and publish-readiness fields are all correct.
The blocked entry gives the safe preserve-and-repair-baseline action and does not recommend publishing.
The summary is compact and does not reproduce raw CSF, hashes, or absolute local paths.
